headline: Did Motorola’s Real-Time Crime Center and Spectrum Tools Upgrade Just Shift Motorola Solutions' (MSI) Investment Narrative?
summary: In April 2026, Motorola Solutions expanded its public safety technology with a major upgrade to its CommandCentral Aware real-time crime center platform and, through Silvus Technologies, launched the handheld FASST 6000 Spectrum Sensor for fast RF spectrum scanning and geolocation in contested environments. Together, these advances show Motorola Solutions deepening its role in mission-centric, AI-assisted public safety workflows while extending its reach into spectrum awareness and signal...

headline: A Look At Motorola Solutions (MSI) Valuation After New RF Sensing Launch And Ongoing Public Safety Demand
summary: Motorola Solutions (MSI) is back in focus after Silvus Technologies, its subsidiary, introduced the FASST 6000 Spectrum Sensor, extending Motorola’s reach into RF sensing and spectrum intelligence for tactical edge operations and distributed sensing networks. See our latest analysis for Motorola Solutions. The launch of the FASST 6000 Spectrum Sensor and the recent evolution of the CommandCentral Aware platform come as Motorola Solutions’ share price sits at US$435.90, with a 90 day share...
